what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG icon showing three circular user nodes connected as a small network.
observations: The root svg uses viewBox "0 0 24 24", width "24", height "24", fill "none", and stroke "currentColor".
The icon draws three circles centered at (12,6), (5,18), and (19,18), each with radius 2.5.
A single path draws a vertical connector from the top node to y=14 and two diagonal branches toward the lower nodes.
Stroke styling uses width 1.5 with round line caps and round joins.
standouts: The icon inherits color through currentColor.
The network idea is represented with three identical node circles and branching connector lines.
conventions: Follows common SVG icon asset conventions: 24x24 sizing, no fill, currentColor stroke, rounded stroke terminals.
Uses basic SVG primitives rather than embedded raster data or external references.
notes: A compact line icon for representing a user network or connected people.
questions: Should this icon be exposed with an accessible title or aria attributes where it is consumed?
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a reusable, theme-color-aware icon for a user network concept.
contribution: Contributes a simple user-network glyph with inherited stroke color, fixed 24px icon geometry, and no external dependencies.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 SVG line icon with three circular user nodes connected by a branching path.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing a user network or connected people within an icon set.
